reports.title: Agent Action Effectiveness
reports.description: Evaluation rollups showing successful versus reversed actions, cost-to-outcome efficiency, and correctness trends across agents and time windows.

parameters.name: window_days
parameters.description: Conversation window in days to include in the report.

parameters.name: trend_days
parameters.description: Number of daily buckets to include in the trend output.

parameters.name: max_agents
parameters.description: Maximum number of agent rollups to return.

measures.label: Conversations
measures.description: Evaluation conversations included in the selected window.

measures.label: Successful Actions
measures.description: Agent actions that aligned with positive conversation outcomes.

measures.label: Reversed Actions
measures.description: Actions explicitly reverted or later invalidated by negative outcomes.

measures.label: Cost Per Successful Conversation
measures.description: Total evaluation cost divided by positive conversation outcomes.

measures.label: Correctness
measures.description: Share of evaluation conversations that ended in positive outcomes.

measures.label: Average Quality Score
measures.description: Average conversation quality score from evaluation outcomes.

sections.title: Agent Rollups
sections.description: Per-agent outcome, cost, and reversal rollups.

sections.title: Correctness Trends
sections.description: Daily correctness, reversal, and cost-to-outcome trends.

sections.title: Reversals
sections.description: Most recent reversed or later-invalidated actions.

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.description: Suggested remediation or tuning actions for weak-performing agent flows.

checks.title: Agent Correctness
checks.description: Agent actions should consistently lead to positive conversation outcomes.

checks.title: Action Reversals
checks.description: Explicit reversals and negative post-action outcomes should remain low.

checks.title: Cost Efficiency
checks.description: Cost per successful conversation should remain within the expected operating envelope.

reports.title: Playbook Effectiveness
reports.description: Workflow execution rollups showing completion, outcome durability, approval friction, repeated remediation, and failure hot spots across playbooks, targets, and tenants.

parameters.name: window_days
parameters.description: Run window in days to include in the report.

parameters.name: playbook_id
parameters.description: Optional playbook identifier to scope one playbook.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Optional tenant identifier to scope one tenant.

parameters.name: target_kind
parameters.description: Optional ontology target kind to scope runs that touched that kind.

parameters.name: max_playbooks
parameters.description: Maximum number of per-playbook rollups to return.

measures.label: Runs
measures.description: Playbook runs included in the selected window.

measures.label: Completion Rate
measures.description: Share of playbook runs with terminal outcomes.

measures.label: Success Rate
measures.description: Share of playbook runs ending in positive outcomes.

measures.label: Rollback Rate
measures.description: Share of completed playbook runs ending in rollback or reversal signals.

measures.label: Average Completion Time
measures.description: Average time between run start and terminal outcome.

measures.label: Approval Bottlenecks
measures.description: Approval-required stages that created friction or blocked progress.

measures.label: Repeat Execution Rate
measures.description: Share of runs that repeated remediation on the same targets.

sections.title: Playbooks
sections.description: Per-playbook execution quality, rollback, and repeat-target rollups.

sections.title: Stages
sections.description: Per-stage failure and approval-friction rollups.

sections.title: Target Kinds
sections.description: Effectiveness breakdown by targeted ontology kind.

sections.title: Tenants
sections.description: Effectiveness breakdown by tenant.

sections.title: Failure Steps
sections.description: Stages that most often failed across the selected playbook runs.

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.description: Suggested remediation for unstable or high-friction playbooks.

checks.title: Playbook Completion
checks.description: Playbook runs should reliably reach terminal outcomes.

checks.title: Playbook Rollbacks
checks.description: Completed playbooks should not frequently require rollback or reversal.

checks.title: Playbook Approval Friction
checks.description: Approval-required stages should not become a systemic bottleneck.

reports.title: Unified Execution Timeline
reports.description: Chronological workflow timeline across evaluation and playbook runs, including scoped communication threads, stage decisions, actions, outcomes, and directly supporting evidence and claims.

parameters.name: window_days
parameters.description: Timeline window in days to include.

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Optional tenant identifier to scope one tenant.

parameters.name: target_kind
parameters.description: Optional ontology target kind to scope one workflow family.

parameters.name: playbook_id
parameters.description: Optional playbook identifier to scope playbook runs.

parameters.name: evaluation_run_id
parameters.description: Optional evaluation run identifier to scope one evaluation run.

parameters.name: max_events
parameters.description: Maximum number of timeline events to return.

measures.label: Timeline Events
measures.description: Returned chronological events after scope and limit filters.

measures.label: Evaluation Runs
measures.description: Evaluation runs represented in the returned timeline.

measures.label: Playbook Runs
measures.description: Playbook runs represented in the returned timeline.

measures.label: Claims
measures.description: Claim events represented in the returned timeline.

measures.label: Evidence
measures.description: Direct evidence events represented in the returned timeline.

sections.title: Timeline
sections.description: Chronological workflow events across the selected evaluation and playbook scopes.

checks.title: Timeline Scope Isolation
checks.description: Tenant and workflow filters should isolate timeline output cleanly.

checks.title: Timeline Support Coverage
checks.description: Workflow timelines should include directly supporting claims and evidence when available.

checks.title: Timeline Stage Continuity
checks.description: Missing stage identifiers should not drop workflow events from the timeline.

reports.title: Decision Intelligence
reports.description: Prioritized decision-grade insights with evidence, coverage, confidence, and optional counterfactual context.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: Optional entity focus for entity-centric evidence and scoring.

parameters.name: window_days
parameters.description: Outcome feedback window in days.

parameters.name: history_limit
parameters.description: Schema history samples to include.

parameters.name: since_version
parameters.description: Optional schema drift baseline version.

parameters.name: max_insights
parameters.description: Maximum number of prioritized insights.

parameters.name: include_counterfactual
parameters.description: Include precomputed what-if scenarios.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Lower bound snapshot timestamp for temporal diff context.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Upper bound snapshot timestamp for temporal diff context.

measures.label: Risk Score
measures.description: Top-line modeled risk score for the selected scope.

measures.label: Coverage
measures.description: How much of the selected scope is covered by the available graph evidence.

measures.label: Confidence
measures.description: Overall confidence after freshness, conformance, and evidence weighting.

measures.label: Freshness
measures.description: Recency-adjusted freshness for the selected scope.

sections.title: Scope
sections.description: Selected entity and time-window context.

sections.title: Schema Health
sections.description: Ontology and schema drift context for the current run.

sections.title: Outcome Feedback
sections.description: Observed outcome feedback feeding intelligence confidence.

sections.title: Insights
sections.description: Prioritized insights with evidence and suggested actions.

checks.title: Schema Conformance
checks.description: Confidence should be reduced when ontology writes are invalid or drifting.

checks.title: Freshness
checks.description: Insights depend on recent graph observations and outcome feedback.

checks.title: Counterfactual Readiness
checks.description: Counterfactual output depends on simulation-ready graph coverage.

extension_points.description: Attach generated narratives or operator notes with explicit provenance.
Attach namespaced benchmark or scenario overlays to individual insights.

reports.title: Graph Quality
reports.description: Graph operability view spanning ontology health, identity linkage, temporal completeness, and closed-loop write-back maturity.

parameters.name: history_limit
parameters.description: Schema history samples to include.

parameters.name: since_version
parameters.description: Optional schema drift baseline version.

parameters.name: stale_after_hours
parameters.description: Freshness threshold in hours.

measures.label: Maturity Score
measures.description: Composite graph quality score.

measures.label: Coverage
measures.description: Ontology coverage across node and edge kinds.

measures.label: Conformance
measures.description: Schema conformance across graph writes.

measures.label: Identity Linkage
measures.description: Share of alias identities linked to canonical entities.

measures.label: Metadata Completeness
measures.description: Coverage for required temporal metadata keys.

measures.label: Closure Rate
measures.description: Share of decisions linked to outcomes or evaluations.

checks.title: Ontology Conformance
checks.description: Unknown or invalid kinds should fail the graph quality bar.

checks.title: Identity Linkage
checks.description: Unlinked aliases reduce graph trust and downstream personalization.

checks.title: Temporal Metadata
checks.description: Missing observed and valid timestamps weaken point-in-time reasoning.

checks.title: Closed Loop
checks.description: Decisions without outcomes leave the intelligence loop incomplete.

extension_points.description: Attach benchmark overlays or tenant-specific thresholds to quality summaries.
Attach additional remediation packs or playbooks.

reports.title: AI Workload Inventory
reports.description: Inventory graph-detected AI workloads across cloud-managed services, self-hosted frameworks, vector stores, data exposure, and shadow AI signals.

parameters.name: max_workloads
parameters.description: Maximum AI workloads to return (1-200).

parameters.name: min_risk_score
parameters.description: Minimum AI workload risk score to include (0-100).

parameters.name: include_shadow
parameters.description: When false, filter self-hosted shadow AI workloads out of the returned inventory.

measures.label: AI Workloads
measures.description: Total detected AI workloads before filtering.

measures.label: High-Risk AI Workloads
measures.description: Detected AI workloads with critical or high risk posture.

measures.label: Shadow AI
measures.description: Self-hosted AI workloads outside the cloud-managed AI service footprint.

measures.label: Internet-Exposed AI
measures.description: Detected AI workloads reachable from the internet.

measures.label: Sensitive Data Reach
measures.description: Detected AI workloads with graph-visible access into sensitive data stores.

sections.title: Inventory
sections.description: Detected AI workloads sorted by graph-derived risk posture.

sections.title: Data Exposure
sections.description: AI workloads with sensitive data reach, public exposure, or plaintext provider-key signals.

sections.title: Shadow AI
sections.description: Self-hosted AI workloads inferred from framework, runtime, vector-store, or credential indicators.

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.description: Prioritized AI-SPM remediation guidance derived from graph posture.

checks.title: Internet Exposure
checks.description: AI-serving paths should not be exposed without strong ingress controls.

checks.title: Provider Key Hygiene
checks.description: AI provider credentials should not appear directly on workload metadata.

checks.title: Shadow AI Detection
checks.description: Self-hosted AI indicators should be inventoried and owned.

checks.title: Sensitive Data Scope
checks.description: AI workloads should be scoped away from unnecessary sensitive data stores.

reports.title: Metadata Quality
reports.description: Metadata-profile coverage view over required keys, timestamp validity, enum normalization, and the highest-volume unprofiled kinds.

parameters.name: top_kinds
parameters.description: Maximum number of profiled and unprofiled kinds to include.

measures.label: Required Key Coverage
measures.description: Coverage for metadata keys marked required by ontology profiles.

measures.label: Timestamp Validity
measures.description: Share of timestamp fields matching the expected timestamp type.

measures.label: Enum Validity
measures.description: Share of enum-like values matching the allowed value set.

measures.label: Profiled Kinds
measures.description: Number of kinds with explicit metadata profiles.

sections.title: Per-Kind Quality
sections.description: Per-kind metadata completeness and validation errors.

sections.title: Unprofiled Kinds
sections.description: High-volume kinds missing metadata profiles.

checks.title: Metadata Profiles
checks.description: Priority kinds should define required keys, timestamp keys, and enum constraints.

checks.title: Required Keys
checks.description: Required metadata keys should be present across profiled writes.

checks.title: Timestamp Validity
checks.description: Timestamp fields should remain valid for bitemporal reasoning.

checks.title: Enum Validity
checks.description: Ontology-enumerated values should be normalized consistently.

extension_points.description: Attach source-specific repair hints or owner routing information.

reports.title: Evaluation Temporal Analysis
reports.description: Evaluation-run contradiction, supersession, and pre/post action world-state diff analysis over scoped claims and evidence timelines.

parameters.name: evaluation_run_id
parameters.description: Evaluation run identifier to analyze.

parameters.name: conversation_id
parameters.description: Optional conversation identifier to scope one conversation inside the run.

parameters.name: stage_id
parameters.description: Optional stage identifier to scope one evaluation stage inside the selected conversation or run.

parameters.name: timeline_limit
parameters.description: Maximum timeline entries to include per scoped claim.

measures.label: Scoped Claims
measures.description: Claims linked to the selected evaluation scope.

measures.label: Contradicted Claims
measures.description: Scoped claims contradicted by later world-model facts.

measures.label: Superseded Claims
measures.description: Scoped claims later superseded by newer claims.

measures.label: Reversed Actions
measures.description: Evaluation actions explicitly reversed or rolled back.

measures.label: Added Claims
measures.description: Claims added between the pre-action and post-action world-state slices.

sections.title: World Diff
sections.description: Knowledge-layer changes between the pre-action and post-action world-state slices.

sections.title: Conflicts
sections.description: Contradictions and supportability issues in the scoped claim set.

sections.title: Claim Timelines
sections.description: Scoped claim explanations and timelines linked to the evaluation run.

sections.title: Recommendations
sections.description: Suggested remediation or adjudication steps for scoped eval contradictions.

checks.title: Evaluation Contradictions
checks.description: Evaluation-linked claims should not be contradicted by later world facts.

checks.title: Evaluation Supersessions
checks.description: Earlier evaluation claims being superseded indicates the agent model drifted over time.

checks.title: Evaluation Reversals
checks.description: Agent-driven actions should not require later reversal.

reports.title: Claim Conflicts
reports.description: Knowledge-layer contradiction report grouped by subject and predicate, including supportability, source attribution, and truncation transparency.

parameters.name: max_conflicts
parameters.description: Maximum contradiction groups to return.

parameters.name: include_resolved
parameters.description: Include resolved or superseded claims.

parameters.name: stale_after_hours
parameters.description: Optional stale-claim threshold in hours.

parameters.name: valid_at
parameters.description: Fact-time slice for contradictions.

parameters.name: recorded_at
parameters.description: System-time slice for contradictions.

measures.label: Conflict Groups
measures.description: Returned contradictory subject/predicate groups.

measures.label: Conflicting Claims
measures.description: Returned conflicting claims across the result set.

measures.label: Unsupported Claims
measures.description: Active claims with no evidence support.

measures.label: Sourceless Claims
measures.description: Active claims with no source attribution.

measures.label: Stale Claims
measures.description: Claims beyond the requested staleness threshold.

sections.title: Conflict Groups
sections.description: Subject/predicate contradiction groups with conflicting values, sources, and timestamps.

checks.title: Supportability
checks.description: Claims should be backed by evidence nodes or observations.

checks.title: Source Attribution
checks.description: Claims should link back to first-class sources.

checks.title: Contradiction Density
checks.description: Contradiction groups should remain bounded for key subject predicates.

checks.title: Truncation Transparency
checks.description: When contradiction output is truncated, total counts must remain explicit.

extension_points.description: Attach adjudication queue metadata, reviewer ownership, or downstream workflow links.

reports.title: Entity Summary
reports.description: Report-level entity view composed from canonical identity, facet modules, posture claims, topology, and support coverage.

parameters.name: entity_id
parameters.description: Entity to summarize.

parameters.name: valid_at
parameters.description: Fact-time slice for the entity summary.

parameters.name: recorded_at
parameters.description: System-time slice for the entity summary.

parameters.name: max_posture_claims
parameters.description: Maximum posture claims to include inline.

measures.label: Risk Score
measures.description: Normalized risk score derived from the entity risk level.

measures.label: Facet Coverage
measures.description: Share of applicable built-in facets materialized on the entity.

measures.label: Subresources
measures.description: Promoted subresources attached to the entity for explanation and provenance.

measures.label: Supported Claims
measures.description: Active posture claims with evidence support.

measures.label: Disputed Claims
measures.description: Active posture claims with contradictory support.

measures.label: Evidence
measures.description: Evidence artifacts attached to the entity support surface.

sections.title: Overview
sections.description: Canonical identity and top-line coverage measures.

sections.title: Topology
sections.description: Grouped relationships and immediate graph context.

sections.title: Facets
sections.description: Typed facet modules derived from properties and claims.

sections.title: Subresources
sections.description: Promoted subresources linked for durable explanation and provenance.

sections.title: Posture
sections.description: Normalized posture/support claims attached to the entity.

sections.title: Support
sections.description: Knowledge support coverage and conflict signals.

checks.title: Canonical Identity
checks.description: Entity summaries should expose canonical refs plus source-native external refs.

checks.title: Facet Coverage
checks.description: Applicable entity facets should materialize from the available source data.

checks.title: Subresource Promotion
checks.description: Nested asset constructs that drive explanation or remediation should be promoted into durable subresources.

checks.title: Posture Support
checks.description: Risk posture should be backed by evidence-linked claims rather than raw properties alone.

extension_points.description: Attach tenant-specific facet overlays or remediation links.
Attach subresource-specific remediation actions, docs, or benchmark overlays.
Attach adjudication, ownership, or workflow annotations to posture claims.

reports.title: Graph Leverage
reports.description: Combined operating view across quality, identity calibration, ingestion breadth, temporal freshness, predictive readiness, query readiness, and actuation closure.

parameters.name: history_limit
parameters.description: Schema history samples to include.

parameters.name: since_version
parameters.description: Optional schema drift baseline version.

parameters.name: stale_after_hours
parameters.description: Freshness threshold in hours.

parameters.name: recent_window_hours
parameters.description: Recent activity window in hours.

parameters.name: decision_sla_days
parameters.description: Decision outcome SLA in days.

parameters.name: identity_suggest_threshold
parameters.description: Identity review suggestion threshold.

parameters.name: identity_queue_limit
parameters.description: Maximum identity queue entries to return.

measures.label: Leverage Score
measures.description: Composite operating score for graph leverage.

measures.label: Ingestion Coverage
measures.description: Observed source-system coverage against expected ingest breadth.

measures.label: Canonical Kind Coverage
measures.description: Share of nodes using canonical ontology kinds.

measures.label: Schema Valid Writes
measures.description: Share of writes conforming to schema contracts.

measures.label: Closed Loop
measures.description: Share of decisions linked to outcomes.

measures.label: Predictive Readiness
measures.description: Readiness for prediction and calibration based on evidence and labeled outcomes.

measures.label: Actuation Coverage
measures.description: Share of actions linked to targets, decisions, and outcomes.

checks.title: Source Coverage
checks.description: Leverage weakens quickly when ingest breadth misses core operating systems.

checks.title: Identity Precision
checks.description: Low-confidence identity linkage erodes cross-source graph trust.

checks.title: Ontology Trust
checks.description: Canonical kind coverage and valid writes are prerequisite for reuse.

checks.title: Actuation Closure
checks.description: Actions should land with targets, decisions, and outcomes.

extension_points.description: Attach tenant-specific required-source sets or benchmarks.
Attach workflow playbooks for leverage remediation.

parameters.name: window_days
parameters.description: Feedback observation window in days.

parameters.name: trend_days
parameters.description: Ontology trend horizon in days.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Optional risk profile selector.

parameters.name: include_queue
parameters.description: Include identity review queue details.

parameters.name: queue_limit

measures.label: Observed Outcomes

measures.label: Rule Signals

measures.label: Identity Precision

checks.title: Ontology Trend

checks.title: Metadata Profiles
checks.description: Priority kinds should define required keys, timestamp keys, and enum constraints.

checks.title: Ontology Conformance
checks.description: Unknown or invalid kinds should fail the graph quality bar.

checks.title: Ontology Trend
checks.description: Weekly calibration should include a non-empty ontology trend slice.

checks.title: Ontology Trust
checks.description: Canonical kind coverage and valid writes are prerequisite for reuse.

checks.title: Outcome Backtest
checks.description: Outcome coverage and signal backtesting must remain large enough for calibration.

checks.title: Provider Key Hygiene
checks.description: AI provider credentials should not appear directly on workload metadata.

checks.title: Playbook Approval Friction
checks.description: Approval-required stages should not become a systemic bottleneck.

checks.title: Playbook Completion
checks.description: Playbook runs should reliably reach terminal outcomes.

checks.title: Playbook Rollbacks
checks.description: Completed playbooks should not frequently require rollback or reversal.

checks.title: Posture Support
checks.description: Risk posture should be backed by evidence-linked claims rather than raw properties alone.

checks.title: Required Keys
checks.description: Required metadata keys should be present across profiled writes.

checks.title: Schema Conformance
checks.description: Confidence should be reduced when ontology writes are invalid or drifting.

checks.title: Sensitive Data Scope
checks.description: AI workloads should be scoped away from unnecessary sensitive data stores.

checks.title: Shadow AI Detection
checks.description: Self-hosted AI indicators should be inventoried and owned.

checks.title: Single Person Failure
checks.description: Critical systems and customer relationships should not hinge on one person.

checks.title: Source Attribution
checks.description: Claims should link back to first-class sources.

checks.title: Source Coverage
checks.description: Leverage weakens quickly when ingest breadth misses core operating systems.

checks.title: Subresource Promotion
checks.description: Nested asset constructs that drive explanation or remediation should be promoted into durable subresources.

checks.title: Supportability
checks.description: Claims should be backed by evidence nodes or observations.

checks.title: Temporal Metadata
checks.description: Missing observed and valid timestamps weaken point-in-time reasoning.

checks.title: Timeline Scope Isolation
checks.description: Tenant and workflow filters should isolate timeline output cleanly.

checks.title: Timeline Stage Continuity
checks.description: Missing stage identifiers should not drop workflow events from the timeline.

checks.title: Timeline Support Coverage
checks.description: Workflow timelines should include directly supporting claims and evidence when available.

checks.title: Timestamp Validity
checks.description: Timestamp fields should remain valid for bitemporal reasoning.

checks.title: Truncation Transparency
checks.description: When contradiction output is truncated, total counts must remain explicit.

section_envelopes.title: Distribution Envelope
section_envelopes.description: Dimension-to-measure breakdown for categorical or grouped sections.

section_envelopes.title: Evidence List Envelope
section_envelopes.description: Evidence rows with source, timestamps, and confidence metadata.

section_envelopes.title: Narrative Block Envelope
section_envelopes.description: Curated narrative block with citations and optional document references.

section_envelopes.title: Network Slice Envelope
section_envelopes.description: Localized graph slice with typed node and edge summaries.

section_envelopes.title: Ranking Envelope
section_envelopes.description: Ranked findings, backlog items, or action candidates with scores.

section_envelopes.title: Recommendations Envelope
section_envelopes.description: Typed recommendation list with target linkage and optional benchmark-pack binding.

section_envelopes.title: Summary Envelope
section_envelopes.description: Headline summary with typed measures and optional highlights.

section_envelopes.title: Timeseries Envelope
section_envelopes.description: Time-indexed series with typed measure values per point.

section_fragments.title: Section Lineage Fragment
section_fragments.description: Reusable lineage metadata embedded in report section summaries and emissions.

section_fragments.title: Section Materialization Fragment
section_fragments.description: Reusable delivery and truncation metadata embedded in report section summaries and emissions.

section_fragments.title: Section Telemetry Fragment
section_fragments.description: Reusable execution telemetry embedded in report section summaries and emissions.

benchmark_packs.title: Claim Conflict Default Thresholds
benchmark_packs.description: Default thresholds for contradiction, supportability, and source attribution.

benchmark_packs.title: Decision Intelligence Default Thresholds
benchmark_packs.description: Default confidence, coverage, and freshness bands for intelligence reports.

bands.label: critical_gap
bands.description: Coverage is too low for decision-grade output.

bands.label: strong
bands.description: Coverage is strong enough for decision support.

bands.label: low_confidence
bands.description: Confidence is too weak for operator action.

bands.label: moderate_confidence
bands.description: Confidence is improving but still conditional.

benchmark_packs.title: Graph Leverage Default Thresholds
benchmark_packs.description: Default thresholds for leverage, actuation readiness, and closure.

bands.label: low
bands.description: The graph is not yet highly leveraged.

benchmark_packs.title: Graph Quality Default Thresholds
benchmark_packs.description: Default benchmark bands for graph maturity and health measures.

bands.label: insufficient
bands.description: Coverage is below the substrate bar.

benchmark_packs.title: Metadata Quality Default Thresholds
benchmark_packs.description: Default threshold bands for metadata completeness and validity.

bands.label: missing
bands.description: Required metadata coverage is too low.

benchmark_packs.title: Weekly Calibration Default Thresholds
benchmark_packs.description: Default calibration thresholds for outcome feedback and model confidence.
